title_en: GR00T N1 brings world-model infrastructure into humanoid robotics
title_zh: GR00T N1 把世界模型基础设施推进到人形机器人
description_en: NVIDIA packages open humanoid robot modeling, simulation, and transfer tooling into the GR00T N1 release.
description_zh: NVIDIA 在 GR00T N1 发布中把开放人形机器人建模、仿真和迁移工具打包成体系。
why_it_matters: It marks a stronger convergence between world-model infrastructure and deployable humanoid robot systems.
